channel.title: Memos on Jake Roggenbuck
channel.description: Recent content in Memos on Jake Roggenbuck

item.title: Building Analytics Tools for RoomU
item.description: Building Analytics for RoomU # I joined the RoomU team as a software Engineer a few weeks ago for my last quarter of UC Davis.

item.title: Learning how users use "Listings"
item.description: Motivation # The RoomU team wants to know how people are using the brand new “Listings” feature.
